methods.name: get_placement_start_from_bending_roller
methods.summary: Calculate the placement start point from the bending roller point at the start of a shape side. The point is local to the start of the base line | | -------- S----x---------------- base line ---> Return: local position of placement start
methods.remarks: Calculate the placement start point from the bending roller point at the start of a shape side. The point is local to the start of the base line | | -------- S----x---------------- base line ---> Return: local position of placement start

methods.name: get_placement_end_from_bending_roller
methods.summary: Calculate the placement start point from the bending roller point at the end of a shape side. The point is local to the end of the base line ----------------x----E base line <--- Return: local position of placement end from E to x
methods.remarks: Calculate the placement start point from the bending roller point at the end of a shape side. The point is local to the end of the base line ----------------x----E base line <--- Return: local position of placement end from E to x

methods.name: get_placement_inside_bending_roller
methods.summary: Calculate the position of a placement inside the bending roller | | X -------- Return: local position of placement start as Point3D
methods.remarks: Calculate the position of a placement inside the bending roller | | X -------- Return: local position of placement start as Point3D

methods.name: get_placement_inside_side_intersection
methods.signature: get_placement_inside_side_intersection(shape1, side_number1, above_side1, shape2, side_number2, above_side2, placement_diameter, local_angles, global_point=False)
methods.summary: Calculate the position of a placement inside the intersection of two shape sides Return: local placement point as Point2D
methods.remarks: Calculate the position of a placement inside the intersection of two shape sides Return: local placement point as Point2D
